results.evidence: RejectedSkillView.tsx:144-146 displays rejectionReason or fallback message. Tests TC-004, TC-005 confirm.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:169-174 conditionally renders Trigger row using getTriggerLabel(). Test TC-006 confirms.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:175-182 renders Submitted (createdAt) and Rejected (updatedAt) dates via formatDate(). Test confirms human-readable output.
Fallback reason at line 146, conditional trigger row at line 169. Tests TC-005 (undefined reason), TC-007 (undefined trigger) confirm graceful handling.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:116 renders entry.skillName via SectionDivider. Data is in owner/repo/skill format per RejectedSkillData interface.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:161-163 renders repoUrl as anchor with target=_blank. Test TC-008 confirms tag, href, and target.
page.tsx:67-73 generateMetadata() returns title and description for rejected skills. Pre-existing implementation, spec notes 'already implemented'.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:186-223 renders 'What to do next' section with guidance text. Test TC-012 confirms.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:212 links to https://spec-weave.com/docs/skills/. Test TC-012 confirms href and target.
RejectedSkillView.tsx:235 links to https://github.com/anton-abyzov/vskill/issues. Test TC-013 confirms href.
RejectionStageIndicator renders PIPELINE_STAGES as 4-stage horizontal pipeline with failed stage in amber (#D97706). Render test confirms all 4 stages visible.
TRIGGER_STAGE_INDEX in rejection-helpers.ts maps triggers to correct stage indices. Tests TC-009, TC-011 and full mapping tests confirm.
RejectionStageIndicator returns null when getTriggerStageIndex returns null (undefined trigger). Render test confirms stage labels absent.
